name: natalia-portfolio
description: Natalia Villegas Calderón — personal portfolio monorepo (webpage, CV, resume)

scripts.dev:web: npm run gen && npm run dev -w webpage
scripts.dev:cv: npm run gen && npm run dev -w cv
scripts.dev:resume: npm run gen && npm run dev -w resume
scripts.build: npm run gen && npm run build -w webpage && npm run build -w cv && npm run build -w resume
scripts.build:web: npm run gen && npm run build -w webpage
scripts.build:cv: npm run gen && npm run build -w cv
scripts.build:resume: npm run gen && npm run build -w resume
